heading: HEALTH CARE OF PERSONS OTHER THAN VETERANS
label: VIII HEALTH CARE OF PERSONS OTHER THAN VETERANS

children.heading: Medical care for survivors and dependents of certain veterans
Counseling, training, and mental health services for immediate family members and caregivers
Examination and treatment for emergency medical conditions and women in labor
Care and services during certain disasters and emergencies
Care for newborn children of women veterans receiving maternity care
Health care of family members of veterans stationed at Camp Lejeune, North Carolina
Transplant procedures with live donors and related services
Mental health services for members of the reserve components of the Armed Forces
